latin: Dux Scotorum, facie caerulo colore picta, ante exercitum suum equitavit et clamavit: 'fortasse vitam nobis eripient — sed libertatem nostram numquam capient!'

questions.prompt: What was notable about the leader's face?
What does he say can never be taken?

translation: The leader of the Scots, his face painted with blue, rode before his army and cried: 'Perhaps they will snatch our lives — but they will never take our freedom!'
